Jack Klimov

Python Team Lead, Software Architect

jaklimoff+cv@gmail.com

About me

Python developer with strong skills in Kubernetes and AWS. More than 10 years of overall experience in software development. More then 5 on leading positions. Professional goals are the long-term collaboration with product IT company with interesting and challenging tasks.

Have designed and implemented substantial, scalable web applications, with fully automated CI/CD pipelines and control systems.

Fluent in many programming languages, including (sorted by descending fluency) Python, Javascript, Go. In the past I’ve also been productive with C++ and Java, though I’m honestly a little rusty with those. Able to quickly become productive in languages and frameworks which I have never used before.
